bonusTasks.title: How UPI Achieved 10 Billion Transactions — Product Lessons
bonusTasks.summary: UPI's design decisions — interoperability, zero MDR, 24x7 availability — were product choices as much as technical ones. Study the decisions that made it the world's largest real-time payments network.
keyTakeaways: Interoperability by design removes network effects as a moat — and grows the whole market
Zero MDR was a deliberate choice to prioritise adoption over monetisation
Regulatory partnerships can be a product accelerant, not just a constraint
